Home / About

Our Story

5+ Years of
Excellence
Who We Are

Born From a Passion for Perfect Coffee

Founded within the vibrant halls of Milestone College, Bangladesh, our coffee shop began as a student-led vision to bring world-class café culture to the local community.

What started as a small counter serving morning espressos has evolved into a beloved destination for students, faculty, and coffee enthusiasts alike. Each cup we craft carries with it the spirit of excellence that Milestone College stands for.

Our pastry chefs train under renowned artisans, ensuring every croissant, cake, and brownie meets the highest standards of taste and presentation. We believe food is an art — and we treat it as such.

Order Now
Our Values

What Sets Us Apart

🫘

Premium Sourcing

We source single-origin beans from award-winning farms across Ethiopia, Colombia, and Brazil.

👨‍🍳

Master Craftsmanship

Our baristas and pastry chefs hold international certifications and bring years of dedicated practice.

🌿

Fresh & Natural

No artificial flavors, no shortcuts. Every ingredient is sourced locally and freshly prepared each day.

❤️

Community First

We're not just a café — we're a community hub where students, creators, and dreamers connect.
